subcodes.first_line: The Divine Will hath dawned from the horizon of Purpose, and He is the Sovereign over all names and their kingdom, and all attributes and their dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اراده الهی از افق مشیت ظاهر و او مهیمنست بر جمیع اسما و ملکوت آن و صفات و جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wisdom [hikmat]
